canonical_definition: A component of The Pile dataset derived from the CommonCrawl web corpus, used in this study as a key validation set to predict downstream performance.

relationships.evidence: We train 70M and 160M language models on the mixture of Github and Pile-CC subset from the Pile dataset (Section 3.1).
